prestazioni: Engine: Coyote 5.0L V8 (code: *TVS-5.0L-V8*, Gen 3 variant with 460 HP stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 forged crankshaft (stroke increased to 98mm), Manley I-beam connecting rods (H-beam for high-RPM stability), and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (11.5:1 compression ratio, coated skirts for thermal efficiency). Paired with a custom billet oil pump from Melling for 30% increased flow to support 8,500 RPM redline.

Forced Induction: Twin-turbo setup using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (88mm compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves. Custom intercooler system by CSF Racing with a 4.5" thick core (1,200 HP capacity) and dual 4" silicone charge pipes reinforced with aluminum mandrel bends. Methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual 1000cc injectors targeting 30 PSI boost.

Drivetrain & Handling: Tremec TR-9070 7-speed dual-clutch transmission with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch (ceramic puck, 1,200 lb-ft torque capacity). Rear differential upgraded to Ford Performance 9" with 3.73:1 gears, ARP studs, and a Detroit Truetrac LSD. Suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 20mm adjustable ride height), Eibach ERS front and rear sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full subframe and control arm refresh).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (S550-specific, carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders with 3" extended wheel arches). Custom carbon fiber hood from Anderson Composites with dual functional heat extractors and a 2" cowl scoop for intercooler ducting. Rear wing: APR Performance GTC-300 (adjustable angle, 3D-printed carbon fiber endplates).

Wheels & Stance: Forged 20x10.5" (front) and 20x12" (rear) Rotiform LAS-R wheels with a 5x114.3 bolt pattern, ET +15 (front) and ET -12 (rear) offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/20 front, 325/25/20 rear). Air Lift Performance 3P management with AccuAir ENDO-CVT tanks for adjustable ride height (flush fitment at -2.5° camber front, -1.8° rear).

Exterior & Lighting: Full custom paint in BASF Glasurit 90-Line 'Lime Gold' with a satin clear coat. Front end: Morimoto XB LED headlights (black housing, 5,500K color temp) with Diode Dynamics SS3 sequential turn signals. Rear: Sequential taillights from Mustang6G with smoked lenses and integrated LED reverse lights. Side markers: Oracle Lighting RGB LED sequential side markers with Bluetooth control via their app.
